metadata.title: Turun Thermohuolto Oy — Refrigeration, heaters & air conditioning
metadata.description: Installation, repair and maintenance of vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems. 24/7 on-call service. Lieto, Finland.

hero.tagline: Specialists in vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems in Lieto — over 20 years of experience.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional installation, repair and maintenance for all brand refrigeration units, heaters and air conditioning systems.

brands.title: Brands We Represent
brands.subtitle: We sell, install and service equipment from leading manufacturers.

about.title: Our Story
about.description: Turun Thermohuolto Oy specializes in the installation, repair and maintenance of vehicle refrigeration units. We operate as an authorized refrigeration equipment retailer and provide government-mandated testing and calibration services.
about.milestone1: Company founded in Turku, Oriketo district
about.milestone2: Relocated to current facilities in Lieto, Tuulissuo area
about.milestone3: 20th anniversary — over two decades of expertise

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Our skilled professionals are here to help you.

quality.title: Quality & Reliability
quality.subtitle: High quality is the foundation of our operations.
quality.standardsDesc: Our management systems meet international testing and calibration laboratory requirements.
quality.service247Desc: Round-the-clock on-call service ensures you get help even in urgent situations.
quality.trainingDesc: We continuously invest in staff training and maintaining professional expertise.
quality.reportingDesc: We deliver error-free, timely products and services backed by a comprehensive reporting system.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are happy to tell you more about our services.

footer.description: Specialists in vehicle refrigeration units, auxiliary heaters and air conditioning systems in Lieto, Finland.
